About Audecy AI

Where expertise
meets execution.

We are not a generic technology firm. Audecy AI is a focused team of AI engineers, full-stack developers, and business strategists who operate at the intersection of cutting-edge research and real-world deployment.

From identifying the right problem to delivering a production-ready solution, we take full ownership of the entire journey — so you can focus on what you do best.

4+
Active Enterprise Projects
100%
Custom-Built Solutions
AI
First Approach to Every Brief
∞
Problems We Can Solve
Current Live Projects
A snapshot of what we're building right now — enterprise-grade solutions across industries, each one stretching the limits of what AI can deliver in the real world.
Intelligent Fault Prediction Engine
Schindler Lifts
+
Real-time ML system that predicts elevator failures before they happen — reducing downtime and maintenance costs at scale.
Clinical Decision Support Model
MedTech Startup
+
An AI model that analyses patient data to surface early risk signals — putting smarter decisions in the hands of clinicians.
Business Strategy & Growth Consulting
Change Pay
+
End-to-end business consulting — from market positioning to revenue strategy — helping Change Pay scale with clarity and conviction.
Badminton Hub — Court Booking Platform
Genki Sports
+
A full-stack sports platform for discovering, booking, and managing badminton courts — built for players, club owners, and communities.
Smart Finance & Investment Suite
Startup Client
+
An intelligent accounting and portfolio tracker that gives users a clear, automated view of their money and investments.
What We Do

Our Services

Every engagement is bespoke. We listen first, then architect a solution precisely right for your challenge — not a template, not an off-the-shelf product.

01
⬡
AI & Machine Learning

Custom models, pipelines, and intelligent systems designed for your exact use case. From predictive analytics to generative AI, we turn data into decisions.

Predictive ModelsNLPComputer VisionLLM Integration
02
◈
Automation & Process Intelligence

Eliminate inefficiency. We audit, redesign, and automate your operational workflows using AI-powered systems that scale with your business and never sleep.

RPAWorkflow AIAnomaly DetectionIoT Integration
03
◎
Web & App Development

Precision-engineered digital products built for performance and scale. Web platforms, mobile apps, and full-stack systems crafted to the highest standard.

React / Next.jsReact NativeFlutterNode.js
04
◇
AI Product Development

From idea to market. We partner with startups to shape, build, and launch AI-native products — handling strategy, architecture, and engineering end-to-end.

MVP DevelopmentAI IntegrationProduct StrategyGTM Support
05
△
Data Engineering & Analytics

Your data is only as valuable as what you extract from it. We build infrastructure, models, and dashboards that turn raw data into strategic intelligence.

Data PipelinesBI DashboardsForecastingMLOps
06
○
AI Business Consulting

Not sure where AI fits into your business? We assess your operations, identify high-impact opportunities, and give you a clear, actionable roadmap to transformation.

AI Readiness AuditOpportunity MappingTech StrategyImplementation Planning
Case Studies

How we solve real issues.

Intelligent Fault Prediction Engine

Predicting elevator failures before they happen.

Business Strategy & Growth Consulting

End-to-end consulting for market positioning.

MedTech Startup
Clinical Decision Support Model

AI model analyzing patient data for early risk signals.

Intelligent Fault Prediction Engine

The Challenge

Unplanned elevator downtime was costing significant capital in emergency maintenance and damaging client trust.

Our Solution

We built a real-time ML system that ingests IoT sensor data from lifts to predict failures before they happen, dispatching maintenance teams preemptively.

The Outcome

Reduced downtime by over 40% in the first quarter and shifted the maintenance model from reactive to predictive.

How We Work

A process built for precision.

I
Discover

We open with deep listening. Understanding your business, your constraints, and the real problem beneath the surface — before writing a single line of code.

II
Architect

We design the right solution — technically sound, scalable, and aligned to your goals. No bloat, no guesswork. A clear blueprint before we build.

III
Build

Agile, iterative, and transparent. You see progress at every stage. Our engineers deliver with speed and rigour — keeping you in the loop throughout.

IV
Deploy & Scale

We don't hand over and disappear. We deploy, monitor, and stay with you as your solution grows — ensuring it performs in production, not just in demos.

Why Audecy AI

The edge
you've been
looking for.

We built Audecy AI on a simple belief — that intelligent technology, applied with precision, can change the trajectory of a business. We don't just consult. We build, ship, and stand behind everything we deliver.

01
Specialists, Not Generalists

We live in AI and automation. It's not a service we bolted on — it's the only thing we do, and we do it at an elite level.

02
End-to-End Ownership

From strategy to production deployment, we handle the full lifecycle. One team, total accountability, zero handoff gaps.

03
Built for Real Results

We measure success by outcomes, not deliverables. Our solutions are designed to work under real conditions — not just pass a demo.

04
Radical Transparency

You'll always know where your project stands. Clear communication, regular updates, and no surprises — from kickoff to launch and beyond.

05
Startup Speed, Enterprise Rigour

We move fast without compromising quality. Whether you're seed-stage or mid-market, we match our pace to your ambition.
